## Compatibility

## Checklist

- [ ] `just check` passes locally (fmt, validate, lint, security).
- [ ] `just docs` re-run; module READMEs updated.
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] Spec updated if decisions changed.
- [ ] `var.tags` propagated to every new taggable resource.
